case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. LUIS ALBERTO DIAZ DIAZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
